name: Agent Result to GitHub and Plane
purpose: Receive OpenClaw callbacks from Codex or Hermes and sync Plane/GitHub state.
core_logic: Treat pr_opened, revision_pushed, and completed with a PR number as successful build handoff.
Treat runner_failed, failed, and blocked as blocked handoff.
Resolve the target Plane state by name in the Plane project.
Update GitHub issue labels so humans can see whether a PR is open or the item is blocked.
safe_failure_handling: Ignore callbacks without Plane issue and project metadata.
Do not move Plane state with hardcoded state IDs unless name resolution fails.
Do not send routine Slack notifications; PR review workflow owns approval notification.
